# LyricLytic v1.1.0 compatibility fixture

These immutable fixtures were generated from the annotated `v1.1.0` tag at
`d25fe58b09822914e3a20e949261020f6397d702` on 2026-07-11.

Generation uses the historical v1.1.0 Rust export implementation compiled by
`cargo test generate_v1_1_0_binary_fixture -- --ignored` in an isolated
worktree. The seed contains an active project, draft, sections, tags, profile,
versions, revision note, song artifact, fragment, logical deletions, Japanese,
an emoji, and a combining character.

Do not regenerate these files automatically. Any intentional replacement must
be produced from the same tag, reviewed as a compatibility change, and update
`SHA256SUMS` in the same commit.
